syncResults.summary: 10 cases synced across 4 files. 028-cart-core.csv had zero pre-existing coupon cases — no sync deletions needed. All synced cases have Automation_Status updated to 'synced' and References appended with 'Synced: VCST-4896 PR#2269 (2026-04-27)'.

cases.reason: Steps referenced removed inline 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox and 'Deny' button in OrderSummary. New widget (.coupons-section) with custom code card is the correct target.
cases.changesSummary: Title updated. Steps now navigate to .coupons-section, scroll to Custom code card, paste code into 'Enter custom code' input, click arrow-right apply button. Assertions updated: green/success border + round-check icon + trash icon instead of disabled textbox + Deny button. Failure signals updated. Cleanup updated: trash icon instead of Deny button.

cases.reason: Steps referenced 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox on /cart for paste verification. Now must target 'Enter custom code' input in Custom code card within .coupons-section.
cases.changesSummary: Steps updated to navigate to .coupons-section, locate Custom code card, paste into 'Enter custom code' input. Assertions updated to reference new input selector. Failure signals updated.

cases.reason: Steps used old inline 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox. Apply must now use preset card in .coupons-section with arrow-right apply button.
cases.changesSummary: Steps updated to use preset coupon card apply button. Assertions updated to verify green border + check icon on applied card. Cleanup updated to use trash icon.

cases.reason: Same inline textbox reference as CPN-028.
cases.changesSummary: Steps updated to use preset card apply button. Assertions include card applied state assertion.

cases.reason: Precondition referenced 'CPN-005 or CPN-028 passed' (state-from-another-case dependency), and apply step was inline textbox. Updated to independent precondition + sidebar apply flow.
cases.changesSummary: Precondition restated as independent state. Steps now apply coupon via .coupons-section before proceeding to checkout. Failure signals enriched with 'applied coupon discount vanishes at checkout'.

cases.reason: E2E steps referenced old inline 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox and auto-apply behavior. Cart apply step now uses Custom code card in .coupons-section.
cases.changesSummary: Cart apply steps rewritten: navigate to .coupons-section, type in 'Enter custom code' input, click apply button. Assertions updated to check applied state on Custom code card. Failure signals updated.

cases.reason: Steps referenced old 'Enter a promo-coupon' textbox. Error feedback now appears as error state on the Custom code card (not a generic error message near an inline field).
cases.changesSummary: Steps updated to use Custom code card in .coupons-section. Assertions now check for error card state: dashed border, red icon, error text 'This code is not valid'. Failure signals enriched.

cases.reason: Steps referenced old inline textbox. Also added assertion that private coupon does NOT appear as preset card in the sidebar.
cases.changesSummary: Steps updated to use Custom code card. Added negative assertion: '@td(COUPON_PRIVATE.code)' absent from preset cards in widget.

cases.reason: Title/steps/assertions referenced 'Deny' button which is completely removed. Removal is now via trash (outline-trash) icon on the applied coupon card. JIRA AC#5 (code retained, not cleared) added to assertions.
cases.changesSummary: Title updated. Steps updated to click trash icon on applied card. Assertions check card returns to default state with code/card retained (AC#5). Failure signals: 'card disappears from DOM entirely after removal (violates AC#5)'.

cases.reason: Precondition assumed coupon already applied (implicit dependency). Now explicit: apply via sidebar widget first. Cleanup updated from Deny button to trash icon.
cases.changesSummary: Steps add explicit apply step via .coupons-section before scrolling to OrderSummary. Cleanup updated to trash icon.

cases.reason: Cart steps used old inline coupon input ('Enter a promo-coupon' textbox, Enter key). Now uses preset card apply + Custom code card for second coupon.
cases.changesSummary: Cart apply steps rewritten for sidebar. Second coupon applied via Custom code card. Assertions verify error state on Custom code card when globally-exclusive first coupon blocks second. Cleanup updated to trash icon.

cases.reason: Old steps looked for 'coupon code input field' on checkout steps. Coupon must now be applied on /cart via 'Discount & coupons' sidebar before proceeding. Checkout review shows read-only applied code display.
cases.changesSummary: Title updated. Steps rewritten: apply coupon on /cart via Custom code card BEFORE clicking Checkout. Added assertion for read-only VcActionInput on checkout review step. Added assertion widget accessible to guests.

cases.reason: Same as CHK-018 — old coupon apply referenced a 'coupon field' on checkout steps. Now must apply via /cart sidebar widget.
cases.changesSummary: Title updated. Steps rewritten: apply coupon on /cart via Custom code card BEFORE proceeding to checkout. Added assertion for read-only VcActionInput on checkout review step. Widget accessibility for B2B users added.

notInScope: 028-cart-core.csv had zero pre-existing coupon cases — no CART-014/015/030/042 found. These were anticipated by the lifecycle task but do not exist in the current CSV.
CPN-028 old steps contained direct inline textbox reference to 'Enter a promo-coupon' in BL-CART-003 test — this was the Promotions BL invariant test, now updated to use preset card.
suite 029 (cart-validation-persistence): zero coupon mentions — no action needed.
suite 030 (cart-merge): zero coupon mentions — no action needed.
011-checkout-flow.csv: grep for 'coupon' returned zero matches — no coupon-named cases exist in that file.

Preset coupon card apply happy path (default → applied state transition)
Custom code card apply valid code
Custom code card apply invalid code — error state with 'This code is not valid'
Radio-button behavior: applying coupon B while A is active auto-removes A
Cancel applied coupon via trash icon — AC#5 code retention

'View all coupons & promotions' link opens /account/coupons in new tab

Failed coupon (type:'failed') shows 'Something went wrong...' error text

global.issue: All Critical/High generated cases have VCST-4896 JIRA reference in References column.
No hardcoded coupon codes in generated cases — all use @td() resolver or {{VAR}} bindings.
Widget steps use .coupons-section class selector and visible text labels ('Discount & coupons', 'Enter custom code', 'View all coupons & promotions'). No positional indices used.
Coupons sidebar group: CART-058/059 (positive), CART-060 (negative/invalid), CART-063 (regression guard/boundary). Meets minimum 1P+1N+1B requirement.

manualItems.description: Verify live DOM behavior of trash icon removal: does the card stay in DOM with default state (per JIRA AC#5) or is the input/code field actually cleared? The AC says 'basket icon cancels the promo code, NOT clears the field' but the exact DOM behavior post-removal needs live confirmation via browser exploration.
manualItems.action: qa-frontend-expert: navigate to /cart, apply coupon, click trash icon — inspect DOM of the card after removal. Confirm card presence and code field state. Update CART-062 assertion if needed before promoting to Reviewed.

manualItems.action: Create a dedicated test user with no targeted coupons, OR verify if any existing user in agent pool lacks pre-listed coupons. Add to test-data/users/ and .env before execution.

manualItems.description: type:'failed' error path (useCoupon.ts exception handler) requires backend error simulation. No easy reproducer in QA without network intercept or mock route.
manualItems.action: qa-testing-expert: use Playwright route intercept to mock /graphql addCoupon to return 500, verify 'Something went wrong...' text appears. Document in CART-066 Preconditions once method confirmed.

manualItems.description: ADVISORY: checkout_coupon_enabled feature flag scope change. PR removes the flag guard from the cart sidebar widget. This may be intentional (flag was only for the old inline input) or may be a gap. Needs PR author confirmation.
manualItems.action: Post comment on PR#2269 asking: 'Is the removal of checkout_coupon_enabled gate from the sidebar widget intentional? Previous behavior: flag=false hid ALL coupon UI on cart. New behavior: flag=false has no effect on sidebar widget.' Hold CART-068 as P2/Advisory until confirmed.

manualItems.description: The radio-button behavior interaction with globally-exclusive promotions needs verification. When first coupon is globally exclusive and second is applied, the sequence in useCoupon.ts is: removeCoupon(A) → addCoupon(B). If A was globally exclusive, B may still succeed (exclusivity enforcement is at promotion evaluation, not at addCoupon level). Test may need re-classification.
manualItems.action: qa-backend-expert: run CPN-042 live. Verify whether exclusively-set promotion A actually blocks B after removal+add sequence. If B applies successfully (globally exclusive A removed first), the test assertion needs updating.

blProposals.status: DRAFT — do NOT add to business-logic.md without explicit user approval
blProposals.rule: One coupon per cart at a time (radio-button enforcement). Applying a new coupon code while another is active must automatically remove the first before adding the second. The sequence is: (1) clearError, (2) if applied !== new_code then removeCartCoupon(applied), (3) validateCartCoupon(new_code), (4) if valid then addCartCoupon(new_code). The cart must never contain two simultaneously applied coupon codes unless multi-coupon is explicitly configured.
blProposals.verify: Apply coupon A → verify A applied. Apply coupon B → verify: removeCoupon mutation for A fired, addCoupon mutation for B fired, cart.coupons[] contains only B with isAppliedSuccessfully=true. No double-coupon discount in OrderSummary.
blProposals.violationSignal: Cart shows two simultaneously applied coupons; discount amount equals sum of both coupons; removeCoupon mutation not fired when second coupon applied; radio-button behavior absent.
blProposals.source: VCST-4896 PR#2269 — useCoupon.ts applyCoupon() implementation: clearError → removeCartCoupon(applied) → validateCartCoupon → addCartCoupon
blProposals.relatedBL: BL-CART-003 (currently covers 'only one coupon per cart unless multi-coupon explicitly enabled' — this proposal makes the auto-remove sequence explicit)
blProposals.note: BL-CART-003 current text says 'Only one coupon per cart unless multi-coupon is explicitly enabled' but does not describe the auto-remove-then-add sequence. PROPOSED-BL-CART-009 makes that sequence an explicit verifiable invariant. BL-CART-003 itself does NOT need modification — the new rule is additive.
